customers_say: Customers find the water purifier to be of good quality, working well, and appreciate its ease of use and professional installation process. Moreover, they consider it an affordable water purifier with amazing water quality after purification, and one customer mentions it saves money on canned or packaged water. However, opinions about service are mixed, with some customers reporting very bad service while others find it satisfactory.

reviews.author: swapnil jagdish shinde
reviews.title: It is the best purifier
reviews.body: Product is very good. Also service is very good. And it is working very well. My water tds was 750 and now it is near about 150. So i am so satisfied with this purifier

reviews.author: Amazon Customer
reviews.title: Satisfactory
reviews.body: Product was good, my tap water TDS was 1400 and its was giving 250 TDS after filter process. I am fine with product.

reviews.author: saif ansari
reviews.title: Satisfied with the product
reviews.body: The overall look and functionality is good, you can buy it.

reviews.author: Nikhil Panchal
reviews.title: Product is Great, Delivery and Installation Were Disappointing
reviews.body: ⭐⭐⭐☆☆ (3/5) I'm giving 3 stars only because of the poor delivery and service experience. The product delivery was delayed by around 7–8 days beyond the expected date. After receiving the package, I also found that one item was missing from the box. A valve that fits into the filter was supposed to be provided in a pair, but only one was included. That said, the product itself is excellent and delivers satisfactory results. The quality and performance meet expectations. However, the installation technician was not very professional, which was disappointing considering the reputation of Eureka F
